title: satureja pineolens
intro: Satureja pineolens, also known as pine needle savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues like coughs and colds. Satureja pineolens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, making it a versatile addition to traditional remedies and modern herbal practices.
